steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “to end a debate” shows that the missing word describes what senators could do with a measure to stop prolonged discussion.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: Invoked means to call upon or put into effect, which fits the idea of using a measure to end a debate. The other three either mean something unrelated, opposite, or not fitting the context. That matches choice B — B is correct.
